title: Makefile: use -ldflags/-gccgoflags depending on the go implemenatiton
body:
While the golang implementation accepts a `-ldflags` parameters, the gccgo implementation prefers `-gccgoflags`.

This patch switches between `-ldflags` and `-gccgoflags` depending on the go language implementation.

FIxes https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11715.
